title: The Red Eye That Won't Quit
opening_statement: I woke up a couple days ago and my eye was really red and irritated. It hasn't really gone away.
personality_summary: Calm, polite, slightly uncomfortable but not dramatic. Answers briefly unless asked follow-up questions. Does not immediately provide all symptom details.

history_present_illness.laterality: Started in one eye, now slightly affecting the other
history_present_illness.patient_assumption: Thinks it might just be irritation or something in the eye

physical_exam.eye_exam: Conjunctival redness, watery discharge, no vision loss

hidden_clues: Watery discharge instead of thick pus
Started in one eye and spread to the other
Recent sick contact with similar symptoms
No vision loss or severe pain
teaching_points: Viral conjunctivitis presents with watery discharge and redness
Often spreads from one eye to the other
Highly contagious, associated with recent sick contacts
Important to differentiate from bacterial conjunctivitis (thick discharge)
Usually self-limited and does not require antibiotics
